title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding

defines.name: BERT
defines.definition: BERT is a bidirectional Transformer-based language representation model pre-trained with masked language modeling and next sentence prediction for fine-tuning on downstream NLP tasks.

problem: Existing pre-trained language models are typically unidirectional, which limits bidirectional context modeling and hurts performance on many downstream NLP tasks.
